summary: Iteration 60 - Admin Sidebar Default Collapsed State & Tooltip Tests - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Sidebar is COLLAPSED by default (sidebarOpen=false, classes: adm-layout adm-collapsed, adm-sidebar collapsed), 2) Nav labels hidden when collapsed (opacity:0, width:0px, position:absolute), 3) All 19 navigation items present and clickable, 4) Toggle button expands/collapses sidebar correctly, 5) Tooltip appears on hover via CSS ::after (content:'Dashboard', opacity:1), 6) CI Orange #FF6B00 used for active nav (color: rgb(255, 107, 0)), 7) No dollar signs - EUR only, 8) Mobile responsive: sidebar horizontal with flex-direction:row, collapse button hidden, 9) Admin login 2-step flow works, 10) Dashboard shows stats (72 leads, 5 new, 27 bookings, 3 chats) and System-Health panel

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All sidebar, tooltip, toggle, mobile responsive tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified sidebar default-collapsed behavior. Key findings: 1) useState(false) at line 136 in Admin.js correctly initializes sidebarOpen to false, 2) CSS classes 'adm-collapsed' on layout and 'collapsed' on sidebar are applied on load, 3) Nav labels use opacity:0 and width:0px when collapsed, 4) Tooltip uses CSS ::after with content:attr(title) - shows on hover with opacity:1, 5) Toggle button data-testid='sidebar-toggle' works correctly, 6) Mobile (<=640px) uses flex-direction:row for horizontal sidebar, collapse button display:none, 7) All 19 nav items have title attributes for tooltips, 8) Orange #FF6B00 confirmed for active nav items

sidebar_collapsed_by_default.details: sidebarOpen useState(false), layout has 'adm-collapsed' class, sidebar has 'collapsed' class on initial load

nav_labels_hidden_when_collapsed.details: Nav labels have opacity:0, width:0px, position:absolute when sidebar collapsed

sidebar_toggle_button.details: data-testid='sidebar-toggle' expands/collapses sidebar, title changes between 'Ausklappen'/'Einklappen'

tooltip_on_hover.details: CSS ::after pseudo-element with content:attr(title), opacity:1 on hover, positioned to right of icon

all_19_nav_items.details: Dashboard, Projekte, Verträge, Billing, Outbound, Legal, Angebote & Rechnungen, Leads, Kommunikation, KI-Chats, WhatsApp, Aktivitäten, Kalender, Kunden, KI-Agenten, Benutzer, Webhooks, Audit, Monitoring

ci_orange_color.details: Active nav item color: rgb(255, 107, 0) = #FF6B00, border-left-color: rgb(255, 107, 0)

no_dollar_signs.details: No $ found in page text - EUR only

mobile_responsive.details: At 360px width: sidebar flex-direction:row, height:65px, position:static, collapse button display:none

dashboard_content.details: 4 stat cards (72 Leads, 5 Neue, 27 Buchungen, 3 Chats), Neueste Leads table, System-Health panel

mocked_apis.DeepSeek_LLM: Routed through Emergent GPT-5.2 mock via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
